description: CompositionGrey melange shorts made of fleece fabric witha brushed finish, broad elastic waist with a drawcord, deep side pockets, one pocket on the right back with fifa embroidery in gold, two navy blue fabric strips on the sides, fifa emblem on left knee and Defender lettering on right thighFittingComfortWash careHand wash or machine washA perfect wear to the gym or while playing a fun game of football, this pair of grey fleece fabric shorts have a rugged look making it a great addition to the wardrobe of a sporty you. This pair of heritage football shorts comes witha  broad and soft, ribbed elasticated waist that sits snugly on the abdomen, while the drawcord allows you to customise the Fit. Inspirational in design, these shorts come with the trademark FIFA emblem and DF lettering enhancing your spirit of sportsmanship.Model statistics1. The model wears trousers of 42" length2. Height-5.11", Waist-31"
